commit_scope: Add privacy-light anonymous meeting traces so the organism can recognize likely return meetings, remember surfaces and duration, and fold prior meetings into registration.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest tests/test_anonymous_meeting_traces.py -q before implementation (expected missing endpoint)
cd web && npm test -- tests/anonymous-meeting-trace.test.ts before implementation (expected missing dependencies/component)
cd api && python3 -m pytest tests/test_anonymous_meeting_traces.py tests/test_meeting_resonance_capture.py -q
cd api && python3 -m ruff check app/routers/meetings.py app/services/anonymous_meeting_trace_service.py app/services/meeting_service.py tests/test_anonymous_meeting_traces.py
local_validation.summary: Anonymous meeting traces store hashed source/session continuity only, keep surface and duration summaries, and fold prior traces into a contributor_id when registration appears. Web build passed with the silent root-layout trace component. Local web/API verifier passed on rerun after a transient warmup slowdown on automation_usage.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR checks, and merge verification.

deploy_validation.details: Public API/web verification will be performed after merge if the public deploy advances.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A public visitor or agent can meet multiple surfaces and later return with the same local source point. The API can answer when the meeting started/ended, how long it lasted, which surfaces were met, and whether prior meetings were folded into a contributor.
test_flows: post /come-in with visitor_key/session-one -> source_point_id + one surface
post /vision with same visitor_key/session-one -> same session with two surfaces
post /with-us with same visitor_key/session-two + contributor_id -> two meetings folded into contributor

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; commit, push, PR, checks, merge, and public verification remain pending.
